SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.ddolib.modeling

Packages that use org.ddolib.modeling
Package
Description
org.ddolib.examples.layered.alp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Aircraft Landing Problem (ALP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.boundedknapsack
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Bounded Knapsack Problem (BKS).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.gruler
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Golomb Rule Problem (GRP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.knapsack
This package implements the acs, astar, awastar and ddo models for the Knapsack Problem (KS).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.lcs
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Longest Common Subsequence (LCS) Problem.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.max2sat
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Maximum 2-Satisfiability Problem (MAX2SAT) Problem.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.maximumcoverage
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Maximum Coverage problem.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.mcp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Maximum Cut Problem (MCP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.misp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Maximum Independent Set Problem (MISP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.mks
The Multidimensional Knapsack Problem (MKP) is a generalization of the KP to multiple capacity constraints: $n$ items and $m$ dimensions of the knapsack are given, each dimension with capacity bound $(C_1,\ldots ,C_m)$.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.msct
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Minimum Sum Completion Time (MSCT).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.pdp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Single Vehicle Pick-up and Delivery Problem (PDP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.pdptw
This package contains the implementation of the One vehicle Pickup and Delivery Problem with Time Window (PDPTW) it has two twists: - it only supports one vehicle because DDO-like solvers have this limitation - it can incorporate unrelated nodes that are not within a pickup/delivery pair of node.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.pigmentscheduling
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Pigment Sequencing Problem (PSP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.smic
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Single Machine with Inventory Constraint (SMIC).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.srflp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Single Row Facility Layout Problem (SRFLP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.talentscheduling
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Talent Scheduling problem (talentSched).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.tsp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.tsptw
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Traveling Salesman Problem with Time Window (TSPTW).
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.gruler
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Golomb Rule Problem (GRP) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.knapsack
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Knapsack Problem (KS) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.misp
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Maximum Independent Set Problem (MISP) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.tsp
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.tsptw
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Traveling Salesman Problem with Time Window (TSPTW) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.modeling.layered
This package contains the interfaces and abstract classes that must be implemented as problem specific classes to model a problem.It also contains default implementation.
org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer
 
  • Classes in org.ddolib.modeling used by org.ddolib.examples.layered.alp
    Class
    Description
    InvalidSolutionException
    Exception thrown by Problem.evaluate(int[]) method if its input solution does not respect the problem's constraints.
  • Classes in org.ddolib.modeling used by org.ddolib.examples.layered.boundedknapsack
    Class
    Description
    InvalidSolutionException
    Exception thrown by Problem.evaluate(int[]) method if its input solution does not respect the problem's constraints.
